description: Build the Spark macOS MVP for real-time Chinese input monitoring, AI English translation, and non-intrusive floating result display.

userStories.title: Create Spark app architecture baseline
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a clear app state and service architecture so later MVP features can be implemented in isolated iterations.
acceptanceCriteria: Add shared domain models for translation result, model config, permission state, and history item
Introduce protocol-based service interfaces and a lightweight AppEnvironment container for runtime wiring
App launches with the new architecture scaffold and no functional regression
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: Architecture baseline with domain models, service protocols, AppEnvironment DI container, and AppState. Build verified successful.

userStories.title: Implement accessibility permission service
userStories.description: As a first-time user, I want Spark to detect accessibility permission status so I know whether global monitoring can run.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a permission service that reads current macOS accessibility authorization state
Provide an action to open macOS Accessibility settings from the app
Expose permission updates to app state so monitoring only starts when authorized
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: AccessibilityPermissionService using AXIsProcessTrusted API, integrated into AppEnvironment, AppState tracks permission state and can observe changes. Build verified.

userStories.title: Build first-launch permission onboarding UI
userStories.description: As a first-time user, I want guided permission onboarding so I can complete setup quickly and start using translation.
acceptanceCriteria: Show a SwiftUI permission onboarding view on first launch when accessibility permission is missing
Display clear unauthorized guidance with actions for opening settings and rechecking status
After permission is granted, app transitions to monitoring-ready state within 3 seconds
Add SwiftUI previews for unauthorized and authorized onboarding states
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: PermissionOnboardingView with state-based UI, ContentView updated to show onboarding when unauthorized and transition to main app when authorized. SwiftUI previews added for all states. Build verified successful.

userStories.title: Implement global input monitoring with auto-reconnect
userStories.description: As a user, I want Spark to capture focused input text changes across apps so translation can run continuously during normal work.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a global input monitoring service that emits focused text changes from supported macOS apps
When active application changes, monitoring reconnects automatically without manual restart
Monitoring service publishes input events into a pipeline consumable by translation logic
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: GlobalInputMonitoringService implemented with AX API for focused element monitoring, auto-reconnect on app switch via NSWorkspace notifications, and Combine publisher for input events. Build verified successful.

userStories.title: Add input content filtering rules
userStories.description: As a privacy-conscious user, I want Spark to ignore invalid and sensitive input so only safe content reaches translation.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter out empty or whitespace-only input events before debounce
Detect and ignore secure or password field input events
Ignore text input originating from Spark's own UI controls
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: Implemented shouldProcessInput() with three filtering rules - whitespace filtering, secure field detection via AX attributes, and self-app detection via bundle ID. Build verified successful.

userStories.title: Add configurable debounce trigger
userStories.description: As a user, I want translation requests triggered only after typing pauses so Spark avoids noisy and expensive calls.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement debounce with default 1000ms idle timeout before triggering translation
Expose configurable debounce range limited to 800-1500ms
Only the latest input event after idle timeout triggers a translation request
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: Implemented debounce mechanism in GlobalInputMonitoringService with configurable timeout (default 1.0s, clamped to 0.8-1.5s range). Added setDebounceTimeout() to protocol. AppState tracks debounceTimeout property and updates service when changed. Build verified successful.

userStories.title: Implement translation API client and connection test
userStories.description: As a user, I want Spark to call my selected AI model and validate connectivity so translation reliability is visible before use.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement translation client using model name, API key, and optional base URL
Normalize model response into a single English translation payload for UI consumption
Provide connection test API that returns explicit success or failure message
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: AITranslationService with OpenAI-compatible API, automatic base URL normalization, connection test using simple prompt, structured error handling. Build verified successful.

userStories.title: Persist model configs securely and support hot switch
userStories.description: As a user, I want model configuration saved safely and applied immediately so changing providers does not require app restart.
acceptanceCriteria: Store API keys in macOS Keychain and never persist secrets in UserDefaults or plain files
Persist non-secret model metadata locally and restore active model on app launch
Switching active model updates all subsequent translation requests immediately
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: PersistentModelConfigService with Keychain API key storage, UserDefaults for non-secret metadata, active model restoration on launch, and hot-switching support. Build verified successful.

userStories.title: Build model settings UI for manage and switch
userStories.description: As a user, I want to add, edit, test, and switch model configurations in settings so I can control cost, speed, and quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings UI lists the current active model and available model configurations
User can add and edit model name, API key, and optional base URL
API key is masked in UI and supports secure update flow
Connection test action shows clear success or failure feedback
Switching active model in settings updates runtime translation client selection
Add SwiftUI previews for empty-state and configured-state settings screens
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: ModelSettingsView with add/edit/test/delete/switch functionality, masked API key input, connection test with feedback, SwiftUI previews for empty and configured states. Build verified successful.

userStories.title: Implement floating translation window
userStories.description: As a user, I want a non-intrusive floating window that shows the latest English translation without interrupting typing.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a floating window or panel that remains visible above normal content while user works
Floating translation UI updates with the latest successful translation result
Window behavior does not steal focus from the currently active input application
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: FloatingTranslationWindow with NSWindow.level = .floating, non-activating behavior via canBecomeKey/canBecomeMain overrides, FloatingWindowManager for lifecycle management, translation pipeline wired to update latestTranslation, monitoring controls enabled. Build verified successful.

userStories.title: Add one-click copy with success feedback
userStories.description: As a user, I want to copy the latest translation quickly so I can reuse it in chats, search, or documents.
acceptanceCriteria: Add copy action on the floating result view for the current translation text
Copy action writes to system clipboard and shows success feedback
Copy interaction does not break input focus in the source application
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: Added copy button to FloatingTranslationView header with NSPasteboard integration, animated success feedback with checkmark and 'Copied' text (2-second auto-dismiss), window remains non-activating (no focus stealing). Build verified successful.

userStories.title: Implement optional local history with default OFF
userStories.description: As a privacy-sensitive user, I want local history disabled by default and controllable via settings so I can decide whether to retain translations.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a settings toggle named Save local history with default value OFF
When history toggle is OFF, new translation results are not persisted
When history toggle is ON, history is stored locally on device only and can be manually cleared
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: PersistentHistoryService with UserDefaults storage, default OFF behavior, history toggle in ModelSettingsView, clear history functionality, AppState integration. Build verified successful.

userStories.title: Add resilience and runtime error handling
userStories.description: As a user, I want Spark to recover from monitor and model failures so translation stays reliable in daily use.
acceptanceCriteria: If monitoring service exits unexpectedly, app attempts automatic recovery within 5 seconds
Permission-missing and model-unavailable states show actionable user-facing error messages
Translation request failures are handled without crashing the app pipeline
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: Auto-recovery with health checks in GlobalInputMonitoringService, RuntimeError enum with user-facing messages, error state management in AppState, ErrorBanner UI component in ContentView. Build verified successful.

userStories.title: Add latency instrumentation and regression tests
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want automated checks for performance and core workflows so Spark MVP quality remains stable across iterations.
acceptanceCriteria: Instrument and record latency from input idle trigger to floating translation display
Add tests for permission gating, filtering, debounce, model switching, and history toggle behavior
Add a mocked end-to-end test for input event to translation display pipeline
xcodebuild test -scheme spark succeeds
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Completed: Added latency instrumentation (lastTranslationLatency property in AppState), comprehensive test suite with 14 tests covering permission gating, debounce clamping, model switching, history toggle, translation failures, and end-to-end pipeline. All tests pass. Build verified successful.
